events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's enduring energy
angles.copy: Still moving like Jagger at 83! We're celebrating the legendary Mick Jagger today. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV Launched 45 Years Ago
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star" as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV's impact on music
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever. Remember watching the first video? What was your go-to music channel?

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking 32 years since its impact on Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe legacy
angles.copy: Thirty-two years of 'Definitely Maybe'! Oasis's debut album still sounds as fresh as it did in '94. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 Years On
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, becoming a pivotal moment in music history.

angles.name: Woodstock's legacy
angles.copy: 57 years since the legendary Woodstock. Three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation. Which iconic performance stands out for you?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: The world remembers the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Elvis's lasting influence
angles.copy: 49 years since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis song?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: The music world marks the anniversary of the passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who died on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's impact
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur today, 30 years after his passing. His lyrical genius and powerful voice left an undeniable mark on music.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: The legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix is remembered today, 56 years after his passing on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix's guitar legacy
angles.copy: 56 years since we lost a true icon. Jimi Hendrix redefined the electric guitar and continues to influence musicians worldwide.

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road iconic status
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks... pure genius. What's your top song from the record?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' fierce frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's influence
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the one and only Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that commands attention.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis legend Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's rock 'n' roll
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the unmistakable Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Oasis anthem?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem "Imagine" was released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine's timeless message
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released the powerful message of 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates today.

events.title: The First iPod Turns 25
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod's revolution
angles.copy: 25 years ago, the original iPod dropped and changed how we listen to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the very first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Favourite Bond moment
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the villains, what's your all-time favourite 007 moment or theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's enduring legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible John Lennon. His music and message live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Comedy legend John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Cleese's iconic comedy
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles' White Album turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album's experimental sound
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles' 'White Album' dropped. An incredibly diverse and experimental record. What's your hidden gem from the album?
